description: Address review findings: fix winner coin deduction, online desync, reverse-proposal bribe, log ordering, and justify bribe slider non-issue
steps: In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, add `winner.coins -= totalBid` before the coin distribution loop so the winner's balance is reduced.
In src/store/gameStore.ts, add online-mode WebSocket sync check at the start of doCoinDistributionChoice, mirroring the pattern used by other actions.
In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, when reverseProposal is found in proposeAlliance, also transfer the current proposer's bribeAmount from fromId to toId after calling acceptAlliance.
In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, move the winner 'gasto X monedas' log entry before the distribution loop that logs each loser's received coins.
Document that the bribe slider reset (issue 5) is a non-issue because React useState does not reset on re-render, only on unmount.
acceptance_criteria: Winner's coins are deducted by totalBid before distributing to losers
doCoinDistributionChoice sends a WebSocket action in online mode before returning
Reverse-proposal auto-accept also transfers the counter-proposer's bribe
The winner-spend log entry appears before per-loser receive log entries
TypeScript compiles without errors (npx tsc --noEmit passes)
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent && npx tsc --noEmit` and confirm zero errors
